items.name: Portfolio Website

Features dark/light mode, dynamic content loading, and GitHub integration
Fully configurable through JSON with automated README generation

jobs.company: Department of Electrical Engineering - University of North Texas
responsibilities: Programming Software Defined Radio's for experimentation of 5G Networks and Systems on UAV's for Advanced Air Mobility Development
Developed Python scripts to interface SDRs with Drone flight controller to establish command and control from Ground station SDRs over the air.
Diagnosed and resolved electronics Board problems on the delivery robots, maintained detailed technical documentation using Confluence and Jira.
Performed motor calibration and drive train performance and system upgrades using terminal and maintained fleet health at 90% to meet client demands.

Performed hardware debugging and repair on electromechanical failures (3D printers/CNC), utilizing multimeters and oscilloscopes to troubleshoot signal integrity issues.3D Printers, CNC, Arduino, Raspberry Pi, Electromechanical systems
Instructed and Trained 250+ students in on- demand engineering concepts such as 3D CAD, Python, Electronics.
Performed End-to-End Data Analysis on large datasets, utilizing statistical methods and Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) to identify actionable trends.
Developed and optimized ML Models on online shopping data using feature Engineering and Machine Learning algorithms such as K-Nearest Neighbors and SVM for classification
